title: AronMav/hydeclaw
summary: Self-hosted AI gateway for personal agents. Rust core + TypeScript channels + Python media hub. 28 LLM providers, 6 chat channels, multi-agent orchestration, long-term memory, encrypted secrets vault.

title: tobocop2/lilbee
summary: Terminal-first local search and AI chat over your documents, code, and crawled websites. Semantic + hybrid search, vision OCR, auto-built wiki, browsable GGUF model catalog. Works as CLI, TUI, MCP server, REST API, or Python library. Offline by default, no sidecar services.

title: LGIAdev/Kivrio-Agent-UI
summary: Local desktop-style interface for using Codex CLI more comfortably with local models.

title: Uragon005/ai-chatbot-svelte
summary: A full-featured, hackable SvelteKit AI chatbot built by Vercel

title: syklon99/ai-chatbot-svelte
summary: A full-featured, hackable SvelteKit AI chatbot built by Vercel

title: giobbu/notes-ai-agents
summary: Notebooks exploring LLMs, AI agents, and their observability and safety with MLOps.

title: langchain4j/langchain4j
summary: LangChain4j is an idiomatic, open-source Java library for building LLM-powered applications on the JVM. It offers a unified API over popular LLM providers and vector stores, and makes implementing tool calling (including MCP support), agents and RAG easy. It integrates seamlessly with enterprise Java frameworks like Quarkus and Spring Boot.

title: DearVa/Everywhere
summary: Context-aware AI assistant for your desktop. Ready to respond intelligently, seamlessly integrating multiple LLMs and MCP tools.

title: itisuniqueofficial-gh/opensyntax
summary: Professional fullscreen terminal AI chatbot CLI with in-terminal provider setup.

title: zs001-agi/asi-api
summary: Wutong ASI API: self-evolving AI, 5 local models, pay-per-token. 🧬 Powered by asi-evolve & code-opt-ai

title: thisisait/nOS
summary: An opensource agentic system infrastructure - not an OS

title: wildlux/Prismalux
summary: Piattaforma AI locale in C puro + GUI Qt6. Pipeline multi-agente, motore anti-allucinazione Byzantino, simulatore 66          algoritmi, matematica locale zero-token. Gira su Ollama. Zero cloud, zero abbonamenti.

title: MrWangJustToDo/MyAgent
summary: My First Ai Agent, wip

title: aminoy77/HelloChusquis
summary: Terminal AI agent with multi-provider fallback, file management, code execution, and persistent memory. Supports OpenRouter, Ollama, OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Groq and 15+ more providers.

title: vishwanathakuthota/openvals
summary: Open-source AI model evaluation and benchmarking framework for LLMs (OpenAI, Ollama, Claude, Gemini)

title: richie-rich90454/training-generator
summary: Training Generator is a cross-platform desktop app built with Electron and Node.js that converts documents (PDF, DOCX, DOC, RTF, TXT, MD, HTML) into structured AI training data. Using local Ollama models, it extracts instructions, Q&A pairs, and conversation data for machine learning, AI fine-tuning, and NLP workflows, while keeping all processing.

title: CrispStrobe/CrispSorter
summary: AI-powered document organiser. Extracts text and/or sorts documents: Drop in a bunch of PDFs, DOCX files, or ebooks, and it extracts Document Text, identifies Title, Author, and Year, with a local or remote LLM, and moves them into folders, and/or keeps the extracted text.

title: Kiln-AI/Kiln
summary: Build, Evaluate, and Optimize AI Systems. Includes evals, RAG, agents, fine-tuning, synthetic data generation, dataset management, MCP, and more.

title: nikazzio/glossa
summary: Multi-stage AI translation pipeline for scholars. Desktop app powered by Tauri, React, and Rust. Supports Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic, DeepSeek, and Ollama.

title: Oolab-labs/patchwork-os
summary: MCP bridge between Claude Code and your IDE (170+ tools — LSP, debugger, terminal, git). Optional Patchwork OS layer adds recipes, approval queue, and oversight dashboard.
